'''Sturn Brunwin''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] front desk attendant at the [[Lucky Despot]] [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] along with their twin, [[Anton Brunwin]]. The two were [[Scoundrel/Legends|swindlers]], and also ran a money laundering business in addition to working the front desk.<ref name="GG7" />
